message:
console.log is not an audit log. Use the shared audit logger so events
reach the audit sink.
fixHint:
Replace with auditLog.emit(...). Server code should not use console.*
at all — use createLogger('module') from @abl/compiler/platform.

message:

reach the audit sink.
fixHint:

at all — use createLogger('module') from @abl/compiler/platform.

message:
Distributed locks must use Redis SET NX PX, not bare SET. Without NX,
two pods can both think they hold the lock.
fixHint:
Use redis.set(key, token, 'NX', 'PX', ttlMs) and verify the token on
release (Lua script) to prevent releasing someone else's lock.

message:

message:
setInterval inside an app pod creates a per-pod ticker that multiplies
with replica count. Use BullMQ repeatable jobs or an external scheduler
instead.
fixHint:
Move the periodic work to a BullMQ repeatable job with a jobId so
only one replica holds it. See bullmq-flows-guide skill.

message:
Hardcoded Tailwind palette colors break theming and accessibility
overrides. Use semantic tokens from @agent-platform/design-tokens.
fixHint:
Replace with semantic tokens: bg-surface, text-primary, border-subtle,
etc. See apps/studio/src/app/globals.css for the full token map.

Bound with a ring buffer, periodically flush to durable storage, or
move to Redis stream / Kafka. Document retention at declaration.

message:
Studio Next.js API routes have NO AsyncLocalStorage tenant injection.
Every Mongoose query must explicitly scope by tenantId and (when
applicable) projectId.
fixHint:
Include tenantId: user.tenantId in every query filter. Do not rely
on database plugins to auto-scope Studio requests.

concernTitle: Security — Centralized Auth, No Hardcoded Secrets
message:
Custom jwt.verify outside the auth packages is a CRITICAL violation.
Use createUnifiedAuthMiddleware / requireAuth instead. A PreToolUse
hook already blocks this pattern; this detector is the audit-time guard.
fixHint:
Replace with requireAuth(req) or the appropriate middleware for the
route surface (Studio, runtime, search-ai).

message:
findById skips tenant scope. Cross-tenant access must return 404 (not 403)
to avoid leaking resource existence, which requires tenantId in the query.
fixHint:
Replace findById(id) with findOne({ _id: id, tenantId }). Bring tenantId
in from req.user.tenantId or the ambient tenant context.

fixHint:
Replace findById(id) with findOne({ _id: id, tenantId }). Bring tenantId
in from req.user.tenantId or the ambient tenant context.

message:
E2E tests must interact only via the HTTP API. Direct Mongoose access
bypasses auth, validation, and tenant isolation middleware and hides
real integration bugs.
fixHint:
Seed data via POST endpoints, assert via GET responses. Start Express
on random ports and exercise the full middleware chain.
